title: Ponnani rape case: Kerala HC upholds order directing FIR against three cops
summary: Kerala High Court upheld a Magistrate's order for FIR registration against three police officers regarding a rape case, finding no procedural issues despite their challenge.

title: Kerala monsoon bumper lottery draw at 2 pm today; record sale of 40 lakh tickets, ₹10 cr first prize
summary: Kerala's Monsoon Bumper lottery achieved a record sell-out, with all 40 lakh tickets sold, surpassing last year's sales. Palakkad district led sales, and the department warned against online fraud.

title: Congress begins construction of delayed housing project for Wayanad landslide survivors
